name: Symphony Under the Stars
description: An enchanting evening featuring live orchestral performances under the open sky. Bring your picnic blankets and enjoy classical masterpieces.

name: Artisanal Baking Masterclass
description: Learn the secrets of sourdough and pastry making from award-winning baker chef Claire. All ingredients and tools provided.

name: Eco-Friendly Gardening Drive
description: Help us plant native shrubs and create new pollination hubs. This event is currently fully registered, but waitlist spots are open.

name: Spring Fun Run & Marathon
description: A past event where the neighborhood ran 5k and raised funds for the local library.

name: Indie Acoustic Sunset Session
description: Unwind with mellow melodies from regional indie songwriters. Limited general admission seating available.

name: Introduction to Web Development
description: A beginner-friendly coding session covering HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript. Bring your laptop!
